Delhi Compressor Station Force Majeure


Notice Text:

Southeast Supply Header (SESH) hereby declares a Force Majeure in accordance with Section 15 of the General Terms and Conditions of its FERC Gas Tariff.  The Force Majeure event is due to the unplanned outages at its Delhi, Louisiana compressor station.  SESH will post updates to the status of the repairs as soon as it is known.

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.

 



BackPrint

Notice Text:

Southeast Supply Header (SESH) hereby declares a Force Majeure in accordance with Section 15 of the General Terms and Conditions of its FERC Gas Tariff.  The Force Majeure event is due to the unplanned outages at its Delhi, Louisiana compressor station.  SESH will post updates to the status of the repairs as soon as it is known.

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.
